name: io.github.AskAHumanOnline/askahuman-mcp
title: AskAHuman MCP
description: Human verification for AI agents. Ask a question, pay via Lightning (L402), get a verified answer.

environmentVariables.name: ASKAHUMAN_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the AskAHuman API

environmentVariables.name: LND_REST_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of your LND node's REST API (e.g. https://localhost:8080)

environmentVariables.name: LND_MACAROON_HEX
environmentVariables.description: Hex-encoded LND admin macaroon for authorising Lightning payments

environmentVariables.name: LND_TLS_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to LND's TLS certificate file (required for self-signed certs)

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error

environmentVariables.name: ASKAHUMAN_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Unique agent identity for attribution and rate limiting (default: askahuman-mcp-agent)
